methods.comment: Set new data and rebuild node tree
methods.name: setData

methods.comment: Shortcut to return default data based on json-schema only

methods.comment: sets a new or modified json-schema and updates data and nodes

methods.comment: Perform data validation and update nodes

methods.comment: Get current validation errors of node-tree

methods.comment: Set new editor state (new tree of nodes)

methods.comment: Get current root-node

methods.comment: Get current node at json-pointer location

methods.comment: Get a plugin by pluginId
methods.name: findPlugin

methods.comment: Set value at given data-location
methods.name: setValue

methods.comment:
@todo addValue only supports setting property, either change api or add iteratively
Shortcut to add a value at a given location. This usually is used to add array-items
methods.name: addValue

methods.comment: Delete the value at the given json-pointer location
methods.name: removeValue

methods.comment: Move the referenced array-item to another array position
methods.name: moveItem

methods.comment: Append an item defined by a json-schema to the target array
methods.name: appendItem

methods.comment: Use `editor.getWidget` to find a widget matching the requested `JsonNode`
methods.name: getWidget

properties.comment: if data should be initially validated
properties.name: validate

properties.comment: if all optional properties should be added when missing
properties.name: addOptionalProps

properties.comment: if json-schema default-values should be extended (required properties, min-length of items). Defaults to false
properties.name: extendDefaults

properties.comment: Remove data that does not match input schema. Defaults to false
properties.name: removeInvalidData

properties.comment: if all supporting editors should update on each keystroke instead of on blur. Defaults to false
properties.name: liveUpdate

properties.comment: if true disables all editors
properties.name: disabled

useEditor.comment: add json editor widget capabilities to your functional component
useEditor.name: useEditor

properties.comment:
Called for all events, e.g. `create`, `update`, `delete`, `undo`, etc.
 Each event loop is finished by a done-event, which contains a list of modified nodes

 `onEvent` may return a new root-node along with a list of changes
properties.name: onEvent

methods.name: removeValue

methods.name: moveItem
